transcription.text: In 1972, you watched the splitting of a Cartier diamond in a full-size Mercury Marquis. Now, they're going to risk it in a smaller Mercury Monarch with its own kind of suspension to see if this Monarch's ride is smooth and steady enough. We picked this bumpy road to make it tough. Remember, he must hit it precisely in a pre-cut groove or lose a $50,000 diamond. How did it go? Perfect. Beautiful. Mercury Monarch, priced under $4,800. Beautiful.
